chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, LARKANA C.P. No.D-879 of 2025. DATE OF HEARING ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF HON’BLE JUDGE 1. For orders on office objection ‘A’. 2. For hearing of main case. 04.09.2025. Mr. Nazir Ahmed Kolachi, advocate a/w petitioner. Mr. Liaquat Ali Shar, Addl. A. G. Mr. Ali Anwar Kandhro, Addl. P. G. -.-.-.-.-.- Compliance reports are filed on behalf of respondents No.2 & 5, taken on record. Mst. Zainab Khatoon complainant of Crime No.32/2025 registered at PS Jaggan @ Hamayoon is present. SIP Azizullah Kato SHO PS Jaggan @ Hamayoon present submits that the alleged detenue Ali Dost has been shown arrested in aforesaid crime. As far as the alleged detenue Ali Raza is concerned, he is also involved in the aforesaid FIR but has not been arrested so far. He further submits that the FIR was registered on 14.08.2025 and the petitioner has maintained instant petition on 27.08.2025 only to exert pressure upon the police to save them from the clutches of law. In such circumstances, instant petition is hereby disposed of with direction to police to ensure arrest of remaining accused involved in the aforesaid FIR. Judge Judge M Yousuf Panhwar/**
